agents.name: java-standards
agents.description: Java 21 + Spring Boot 3.3 coding standards. Hexagonal architecture, Spring Data JDBC, ArchUnit rules.

agents.name: openapi-standards
agents.description: OpenAPI 3.1 contract-first design rules. Schema design, naming conventions, error shapes, code-generation constraints.

agents.name: maven-standards
agents.description: Maven 3.9 build standards. openapi-generator plugin config, multi-module layout, code-generation workflow.

agents.name: frontend-standards
agents.description: React 18 + TypeScript 5 standards for SmartRetail MFEs. Tailwind CSS, Recharts, @aws-amplify/auth patterns.

agents.name: sql-standards
agents.description: SQL and Flyway migration standards. Schema ownership, naming conventions, cross-schema join prohibition.

agents.name: testing-standards
agents.description: Testing standards for SmartRetail. Unit, integration, ArchUnit patterns for Spring Boot and React MFEs.

agents.name: aws-architect
agents.description: Senior AWS Solutions Architect. Designs and reviews CDK stacks, ECS/RDS/SQS/Firehose/EventBridge config, IAM policies, and multi-environment deployment strategy.

agents.name: java-developer
agents.description: Senior Java 21 Developer. Implements Spring Boot 3.3 services following hexagonal architecture. Contract-first with OpenAPI. Spring Data JDBC, SQS listeners, EventBridge publishers.

agents.name: tester
agents.description: QA Engineer. Writes JUnit 5 + Mockito unit tests, Testcontainers ITs, ArchUnit tests, and Vitest + RTL MFE tests. Diagnoses smoke-test failures.

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Senior Code Reviewer. Checks all 8 architecture non-negotiables, forbidden patterns, security issues, and test coverage. Provides BLOCK / SUGGEST / NIT feedback.

agents.name: ops-engineer
agents.description: Platform / Ops Engineer. Manages local dev environment (Docker Compose + LocalStack), Makefile targets, Flyway migrations, CDK deploys, and CloudWatch observability.

agents.name: enterprise-architect
agents.description: Senior Enterprise Architect. Guards bounded context boundaries, event contract design, schema cross-cutting concerns, API versioning, and hexagonal architecture integrity.

agents.name: react-developer
agents.description: Senior React / Frontend Developer. Builds supply chain MFEs with React 18, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS, Recharts. Implements data-freshness, approve/reject, and chart patterns.

agents.name: ml-engineer
agents.description: ML / Data Engineer. Owns DFS service, SageMaker Trigger Lambda, Batch Post-Processor Lambda, forecast pipeline design, MAPE accuracy monitoring, and seed forecast data.

agents.name: retail-sme
agents.description: Retail Supply Chain SME. Validates flow specs against real operations, advises on KPI thresholds, reviews seed data realism, and explains domain concepts to the team.

agents.name: aws-finops-analyst
agents.description: AWS FinOps Analyst. Evaluates and optimises infrastructure cost across poc, dev, stg, and prod environments. Right-sizes ECS/RDS, designs tagging strategies, recommends Savings Plans, and identifies waste.
